Hence, it seems more aligned towards addressing viral threats over bacteria directly.

While bacterial infections do represent a concern, especially in platelet transfusions according to several references like article-142864_10, they don't seem central to the core preventative measure described across the literature. Hence, it seems more aligned towards addressing viral threats over bacteria directly.
